name: allneurons-minimike
description: Mini-Mike — a set of AI skills built specifically for legal work, plugging into general AI platforms like Claude Cowork so lawyers get the precision their work demands without leaving the platform they already use. Built by allNeurons, a team of MAANG engineers and practicing lawyers.

plugins.name: mini-mike
plugins.description: Reviews commercial contracts and produces a structured Excel workbook: a General Key Terms tabular review (parent skill, mm-Tabular-Review) with section citations, plus an optional Change of Control / Transfer deep-dive (child skill, mm-COC-Tabular-Review) for M&A diligence (91-93% accuracy on CoC in internal evals). Supports batch processing, password-protected files, and contracts with amendments. More contract types and sub-skills ship as community feedback comes in.
